name: ScienceSwarm Research Design Review
description: Review and upgrade a research idea, protocol, brown-bag brief, or study plan into an execution-ready research design document with validity checks, analysis plan, reproducibility package, and handoff tasks.
summary: A rigorous pre-execution research design review for scientists, mathematicians, social scientists, and engineers. Produces a saved Execution-Ready Research Design with claims, method fit, validity threats, workstreams, tests, reproducibility, and publication fit.
